---
title: "WB Farmer Hotline Screening Phone Survey"
author: "Frontieri consultancy"

date: "[Feb 12, 2026 | 01:00 AM]"

output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: row
    vertical_layout: fill
    
    logo: logo.png
    
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(haven)
library(plyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(highcharter)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
library(hrbrthemes)
```

```{r}
data <- read_dta(
  "D:/Econsight/Dashboard/WB Farmer Hotline Screening Phone_Survey/Raw Data/Pilot_Farmer_Hotline_Screening_Phone_Survey_WIDE.dta"
)

data <- data %>% mutate(across(where(is.labelled), as_factor))

data <- data %>%
  rename(
    region        = region_preload,
    enum_name     = enumerator_name,
    marital_statu = q1_2_d
  ) %>%
  select(-consent) %>%
  rename(consent = consent1)

data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    enum_name = str_replace_all(
      enum_name,
      c(
        "Abidulahi mohammed" = "Abidulahi",
        "Addis Worku" = "Addis",
        "Aklilu Zewde Birhane" = "Aklilu",
        "Atakilit Tadesse" = "Atakilit",
        "Bruktawit Molla" = "Bruktawit",
        "Daniel Abebaw" = "Daniel",
        "Eyerus halfom" = "Eyerus",
        "Hilariy Girmay" = "Hilariy",
        "Kabtamu Alemayehu" = "Kabtamu",
        "Kalkidan Wondatir" = "Kalkidan",
        "Mariyam Gudeta" = "Mariyam",
        "Ruth Asfaw" = "Ruth",
        "Shewakena Damitew" = "Shewakena",
        "Sitota G/melak" = "Sitota",
        "Tadele Ejo" = "Tadele",
        "Tena tesfaye" = "Tena",
        "Tirsit Seyoum" = "Tirsit",
        "Tirunesh Ajema" = "Tirunesh",
        "Urgessa Mekonnen" = "Urgessa",
        "Fikadu Thomas" = "Fikadu",
        "Yakob Debela" = "Yakob"
      )
    )
  )

```

HOME
=====================================
Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------


### TOTAL SYNCED PILOT INTERVIEWS

```{r}
total_interview<-nrow(data)
valueBox(total_interview, icon = "fa-bar-chart")
```

## Column

### NO. OF INTERVIEWS BY ENUMERATOR {data-width="600"}

```{r Endline}
Abidulahi <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Abidulahi") %>% nrow()
Addis <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Addis") %>% nrow()
Aklilu <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Aklilu") %>% nrow()
Atakilit <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Atakilit") %>% nrow()
Bruktawit <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Bruktawit") %>% nrow()
Daniel <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Daniel") %>% nrow()
Eyerus <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Eyerus") %>% nrow()
Hilariy <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Hilariy") %>% nrow()
Kabtamu <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Kabtamu") %>% nrow()
Kalkidan <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Kalkidan") %>% nrow()
Mariyam <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Mariyam") %>% nrow()
Ruth <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Ruth") %>% nrow()
Shewakena <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Shewakena") %>% nrow()
Sitota <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Sitota") %>% nrow()
Tadele <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Tadele") %>% nrow()
Tena <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Tena") %>% nrow()
Tirsit <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Tirsit") %>% nrow()
Tirunesh <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Tirunesh") %>% nrow()
Urgessa <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Urgessa") %>% nrow()
Fikadu <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Fikadu") %>% nrow()
Yakob <- data %>% filter(enum_name == "Yakob") %>% nrow()

data %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(enum_name)) %>% 
  dplyr::count(enum_name) %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  hchart(
    "column",
    hcaes(x = enum_name, y = n)
  ) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Number of Interviews Completed by Enumerator") %>%
  hc_xAxis(title = list(text = "Enumerator")) %>%
  hc_yAxis(title = list(text = "Total Interviews")) %>%
  hc_tooltip(pointFormat = "<b>{point.y}</b> interviews") %>%
  hc_plotOptions(
    column = list(
      dataLabels = list(enabled = TRUE)
    )
  ) %>%
  hc_colors(c(
    "#2ECC71", "#3498DB", "#F1C40F", "#E67E22",
    "#9B59B6", "#1ABC9C", "#E91E63", "#34495E"
  ))


```


### SYNCED INTERVIEWS BY CONSENT STATUS {data-width=400}

```{r }

data %>% 
  filter(!is.na(consent)) %>%
  count(consent) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  hchart(
    "column",
    hcaes(x = consent, y = n)
  ) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Consent Status of Respondents") %>%
  hc_xAxis(title = list(text = "Consent")) %>%
  hc_yAxis(title = list(text = "Number of Respondents")) %>%
  hc_plotOptions(
    column = list(
      borderRadius = 6,
      dataLabels = list(
        enabled = TRUE,
        format = "{point.y}",
        style = list(fontWeight = "bold")
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  hc_tooltip(pointFormat = "<b>{point.y}</b> respondents") %>%
  hc_colors(
    c(
      "Yes" = "#2E7D32",
      "No"  = "#D32F2F" 
    )
  )

```

## Column

### NO. OF INTERVIEWS  BY REGION {data-width=300}

```{r }
data %>% 
  dplyr::count(region) %>%
  arrange(-n) %>% 
  hchart('bar', hcaes(x = 'region', y = 'n'), color_stops(n=4, colors = c("#F65A83", "#FF1E00", "#21E1E1", "#224B0C")))
```

### NO. OF INTERVIEWS DONE BY DATE {data-width=400}

```{r}
data %>%
  mutate(
    SubmissionDate = as.Date(SubmissionDate, format = "%d%b%Y")
  ) %>%
  count(SubmissionDate) %>%
  arrange(SubmissionDate) %>%
  hchart(
    "line",
    hcaes(SubmissionDate, n)
  ) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Interviews Over Interview Submission Date") %>%
  hc_xAxis(type = "datetime") %>%
  hc_colors("#2E7D32")

```

### NO. OF INTERVIEWS  BY GENDER {data-width=300}

```{r }
data %>% 
  filter(!is.na(gender)) %>%
  count(gender) %>%
  mutate(
    percent = n / sum(n) * 100
  ) %>%
  hchart(
    "pie",
    hcaes(x = gender, y = n)
  ) %>%
  hc_plotOptions(
    pie = list(
      innerSize = "55%",
      dataLabels = list(
        enabled = TRUE,
        format = "{point.name}: {point.y} ({point.percentage:.1f}%)",
        style = list(fontWeight = "bold", fontSize = "12px")
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  hc_tooltip(
    pointFormat = "<b>{point.y}</b> interviews<br>{point.percentage:.1f}%"
  ) %>%
  hc_colors(
    c(
      "Male"   = "#2E7D32", 
      "Female" = "#EC407A"
    )
  )
```


### RESPONDENTS BY AGE {data-width=400}

```{r }
data %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(age)) %>%
  dplyr::count(age) %>%
  arrange(age) %>% 
  hchart(
    "line",
    hcaes(x = age, y = n)
  ) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Respondents by Age") %>%
  hc_xAxis(title = list(text = "Age")) %>%
  hc_yAxis(title = list(text = "Number of Respondents")) %>%
  hc_colors("#2E7D32")

```

MORE GRAPH
=====================================
Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### NO. OF INTERVIEWS BY AGE GROUP  {data-width=400}

```{r }
library(dplyr)
library(highcharter)

data %>%
  filter(!is.na(age)) %>%
  mutate(
    age = as.numeric(age),
    age_group = cut(
      age,
      breaks = c(15, 24, 34, 44, 54, 64, Inf),
      labels = c("15–24", "25–34", "35–44", "45–54", "55–64", "65+")
    )
  ) %>%
  count(age_group) %>%
  hchart(
    "pie",
    hcaes(x = age_group, y = n)
  ) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Respondents by Age Group") %>%
  hc_plotOptions(
    pie = list(
      dataLabels = list(
        enabled = TRUE,
        format = "{point.name}: {point.percentage:.1f}%"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  hc_colors(c("#2E7D32", "#F9A825", "#EC407A", "#21E1E1", "#FF9800", "#9E9E9E"))


```

### REPORT BY MAIN MOBILE USER {data-width=400}

```{r }
data %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(q1_2_a)) %>% 
  dplyr::count(q1_2_a) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    percent = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1),
    label = paste0(n, " (", percent, "%)")
  ) %>%
  hchart(
    "pie",
    hcaes(
      x = q1_2_a,
      y = n
    )
  ) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Are you the main user of this mobile phone number?") %>%
  hc_tooltip(
    pointFormat = "<b>{point.y}</b> respondents<br>{point.percentage:.1f}%"
  ) %>%
  hc_plotOptions(
    pie = list(
      dataLabels = list(
        enabled = TRUE,
        format = "{point.name}: {point.y} ({point.percentage:.1f}%)"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  hc_colors(c("#2ECC71", "#E91ED3"))

```

Column 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

###  EDUCATIONAL STATUSE OF RESPONDENTS {data-width=400}

```{r }
data %>% 
  filter(!is.na(q2_1_i)) %>%
  count(q2_1_i) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  hchart(
    "column",
    hcaes(x = q2_1_i, y = n)
  ) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Education Status of Respondents") %>%
  hc_xAxis(title = list(text = "Attended School")) %>%
  hc_yAxis(title = list(text = "Number of Respondents")) %>%
  hc_plotOptions(
    column = list(
      borderRadius = 6,
      dataLabels = list(
        enabled = TRUE,
        format = "{point.y}",
        style = list(fontWeight = "bold")
      )
    )
  )

```

### RESPONDENT'S CHILD OWNERSHIP STATUS  {data-width=400}

```{r }
library(dplyr)
library(highcharter)

data %>% 
  filter(!is.na(q2_1_g)) %>%        # remove missing FIRST
  count(q2_1_g) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  hchart(
    "column",
    hcaes(x = q2_1_g, y = n)
  ) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Do You Have Any Child?") %>%
  hc_xAxis(title = list(text = "Response")) %>%
  hc_yAxis(title = list(text = "Number of Respondents")) %>%
  hc_plotOptions(
    column = list(
      borderRadius = 6,
      dataLabels = list(
        enabled = TRUE,
        format = "{point.y}",
        style = list(fontWeight = "bold")
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  hc_tooltip(pointFormat = "<b>{point.y}</b> respondents") %>%
  hc_colors(
    c(
      "#2E7D32",  # Green
      "#EC407A",  # Pink
      "#F9A825",  # Yellow
      "#21E1E1"   # Cyan
    )
  )

```
